name: Tirami Su"pick Me up Cake
recipeInstructions:
The first set of ingredients is for the filling.
1) Whisk egg yolks and 1/4 cup of sugar together in a bowl.
Whip in the Mascarpone cheese.
2) In a separate bowl, whip the cream, the remaining sugar,
and vanilla until almost stiff - no peaks.
3) Gently fold the Mascarpone cheese mixture into the whipped
cream and continue to whisk until stiff.
4) Set aside.
5) Make a dissolved syrup by dissolving 1/4 cup of sugar,
2 Tablespoons water, espresso, and rum in a bowl.
6) Brush one layer of sponge cake with the espresso mixture.
Using an offset spatula, spread about half an inch
of mascarpone cheese mixture on top.
7) Brush the second layer with espresso, placing it
espresso side down on the first layer.
Brush the top with espresso and spread another
half inch of mascarpone cheese mixture.
8) Repeat the procedure with the third layer of cake.
9) Sprinkle the top of the cake with cocoa powder using a sieve.
Cover the sides of the cake with chocolate shavings.
Refrigerate at least three hours. This cake does not hold up well
when exposed to heat, so keep it cool.
From the book; La Cucina di Andrea's by Author Chef Andrea Apuzzo
